chosen_action.title: Pushed tighter first-run conversion docs to Ralph Workflow repo

why_this_action.summary: Primary repo adoption is flat and outreach lanes are saturated. The strongest executable move was to improve the top-level repo surfaces that convert qualified visitors into a real first run and Codeberg follow-through.
shared_findings_used: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: conversion from interest to free use is the bottleneck
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: primary repo movement is flat and same-family outreach is saturated
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: top-level messaging must answer what it is, who it is for, why it is different, and why use it now

verification: relative-link check passed for README.md, START_HERE.md, docs/README.md

measurement.expected_outcome: Clearer qualified-repo conversion into first-run attempts and stronger Codeberg-first public follow-through
success_signals: New issue or feedback citing first-run docs
measurement.replacement_condition: If primary repo adoption is still flat after the review window, treat this docs push as insufficient and switch to a different executable demand-capture lane.
